zh.Dyffryn, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾代福瑞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel於大約1005年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Coel ap Gwerydd31歲，母親Coel Ap Gweirydd14歲。他和Efa ferch Cynfyn至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1065年享年62歲。

zh-hans.Dyffryn, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾代福瑞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel于大约1005年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Coel ap Gwerydd31岁，母亲Coel Ap Gweirydd14岁。他和Efa ferch Cynfyn至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1065年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eberhard.
German: variant of   Axt  .
Swedish: soldier's name, apparently from ax ‘ear (i.e. the part of a cereal plant which contains its flowers or seeds)’.

variants.name: Akes
meanings: German: possibly a variant of Ax . The surname Akes is virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: Axt
meanings: German: metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, carpenter, or maker of axes, from Middle High German ackes, axt- ‘axe’.

nameMeanings.name: Coel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Manfred, Hans, Helmut, Helmuth, Ilse.
English (northern): variant of   Jewell  .
German, French, and Jewish: from the personal name Joel, Hebrew Yoel, borne by a Biblical prophet.

variants.name: Joles
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the Hebrew personal name Yoel (see Joel ) + Yiddish possessive -s.

variants.name: Jewell
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): from an Old Breton personal name, Iudhael, composed of elements meaning ‘lord’ + ‘generous, bountiful’ (see Jewkes ), which was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, a king of Brittany who abdicated and spent the last part of his life in a monastery. Forms of this name are found in medieval records not only in Devon and Cornwall, where they are of native origin, but also in East Anglia and even Yorkshire, where they were imported by Bretons after the Norman Conquest. The name was seemingly reintroduced from France in the 17th century by Huguenots.

variants.name: Gioe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Agostino, Carlo, Gasper, Matteo.
Italian (Gioè): perhaps from a shortened form of the personal name Gioele, an equivalent of Joel 2.

variants.name: Gowland
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): habitational name from Gowlands in Moor Monkton, Yorkshire.
English: alternatively, perhaps a variant of Golland, from the Old French and Middle English personal name Joelin, a diminutive of Joel .

variants.name: Cioe
meanings: Italian (Lazio; Cioè): perhaps from a short form of the personal name Gioele (equivalent of Joel 2) with a phonetic alteration.

variants.name: Joelson
meanings: English: patronymic from Joel (from the Breton personal name Iudhael, see Jewell ) + -son.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywelyn
meanings: (Welsh)  See  Llewelyn .

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: See Lywelyn.

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel was born about 1005, in Wales, his father, Coel ap Gwerydd, was 31 and his mother, Coel Ap Gweirydd, was 14. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Efa ferch Cynfyn. He died about 1065, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel est né environ 1005, à Galles, son père, Coel ap Gwerydd, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Coel Ap Gweirydd, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Efa ferch Cynfyn. Il est décédé environ 1065, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel um 1005 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Coel ap Gwerydd 31 und seine Mutter Coel Ap Gweirydd 14. Er hatte mit Efa ferch Cynfyn mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1065 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

ht.of Flint,Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel è nato il circa 1005 nel Galles, il suo padre, Coel ap Gwerydd, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Coel Ap Gweirydd, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Efa ferch Cynfyn. Morì circa 1065, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coelが約1005年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Coel ap Gweryddは31歳，母Coel Ap Gweiryddは14歳であった。彼はEfa ferch Cynfynとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1065年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel(이)가 대략 1005년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Coel ap Gwerydd(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Coel Ap Gweirydd(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Efa ferch Cynfyn(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1065년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel nasceu aproximadamente 1005, em Gales, seu pai, Coel ap Gwerydd, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Coel Ap Gweirydd, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Efa ferch Cynfyn. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1065, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel родился около 1005 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Coel ap Gwerydd было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Coel Ap Gweirydd, 14. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Efa ferch Cynfyn. Он умер около 1065 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel nació aproximadamente 1005, en Gales, su papá, Coel ap Gwerydd, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Coel Ap Gweirydd, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Efa ferch Cynfyn. Murió aproximadamente 1065, a la edad de 62 años.
